mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, A.* FROM ( SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_customer,
TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.product_desc, 1000, 1)) AS product_desc,
p.rate_category, p.is_active, p.created_at,
p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month,
p.min_amount, p.max_amount,
p.app_start_date, p.app_end_date,
NVL(MIN(r.base_rate), 0) AS min_rate,
NVL(MAX(r.base_rate + NVL(r.perferential_rate, 0)), 0) AS max_rate
FROM product p
LEFT JOIN rate r ON p.product_id = r.product_id AND r.is_active = 'Y'
WHERE 1=1 AND p.is_active = 'T' AND p.approve_status = '승인'
AND ( p.product_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(p.product_desc, #{keyword}) > 0 )
AND p.product_type = #{productType}
AND ( p.target_customer = #{targetCustomer} OR p.target_customer = 'all' )
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_customer,
TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.product_desc, 1000, 1)),
p.rate_category, p.is_active, p.created_at,
p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month,
p.min_amount, p.max_amount,
p.app_start_date, p.app_end_date
ORDER BY max_rate DESC
ORDER BY p.product_name ASC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product p
WHERE 1=1 AND p.is_active = 'T' AND p.approve_status = '승인'
AND ( p.target_customer = #{targetCustomer} OR p.target_customer = 'all' )
AND p.product_type = #{productType}
AND ( p.product_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(p.product_desc, #{keyword}) > 0 )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_customer,
TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.product_desc, 1000, 1)) AS product_desc,
p.rate_category,
p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month,
p.min_amount, p.max_amount,
p.app_start_date, p.app_end_date,
NVL(MIN(r.base_rate), 0) AS min_rate,
NVL(MAX(r.base_rate + NVL(r.perferential_rate, 0)), 0) AS max_rate
FROM product p
LEFT JOIN rate r ON p.product_id = r.product_id AND r.is_active = 'Y'
WHERE p.is_active = 'T' AND p.approve_status = '승인'
AND ( p.target_customer = #{targetCustomer} OR p.target_customer = 'all' )
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_customer,
TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.product_desc, 1000, 1)),
p.rate_category,
p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month,
p.min_amount, p.max_amount,
p.app_start_date, p.app_end_date
ORDER BY max_rate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT product_id, is_active, product_name, product_type, target_customer, product_desc,
min_amount, max_amount,
min_period_month, max_period_month,
interest_payment_type, applied_exchange_rate_type,
app_start_date, app_end_date,
mkt_msg_top, mkt_msg_bottom,
join_method, auto_transfer_svc, revolving_info, saving_method,
payment_restriction, precautions,
fx_cash_fee, auto_reinvestment,
tax_benefit, payment_limit_info,
data_access_right, illegal_contract_cancel,
depositor_protection,
rate_category, approve_status
FROM product WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT product_currency_id, product_id, currency_code, currency_name, is_available
FROM product_currency
WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_available = 'Y'
ORDER BY currency_code

SELECT rate_id, product_id, currency_code,
customer_type, residency_type,
period_month,
base_rate,
perferential_rate AS preferential_rate,
base_rate + NVL(perferential_rate, 0) AS max_rate,
maturity_rate, early_cancel_rate,
rate_start_date, rate_end_date,
is_active, rate_type
FROM rate
WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_active = 'Y'
ORDER BY currency_code, period_month ASC

SELECT p.pref_rate_id, p.rate_id, p.condition_type, p.condition_desc, p.pref_rate
FROM pref_rate_condition p
JOIN rate r ON p.rate_id = r.rate_id
WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.is_active = 'Y'
ORDER BY p.pref_rate DESC
